title: Chinese Buddhist: Avatamsaka Sutra (Buddhabhadra) (2)
description: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Avatamsaka Sutra (Buddhabhadra)
introduction: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Avatamsaka Sutra (Buddhabhadra)

translation.text: From Avatamsaka Sutra (Buddhabhadra): A core text of Chinese Buddhism, transmitted through the great translation period and forming the basis of East Asian Buddhist practice.
